title: Refreshing Peruvian Potato Bowl
description: A light, crisp Peruvian potato bowl that layers sweet and yellow potatoes with a tangy kimchi quinoa dressing, served chilled in a ceramic tanje.
instructions: Boil sweet potato slices until just tender, then drain and let cool.
Boil yellow potato slices until just tender, then drain and let cool.
In a bowl, whisk cooked quinoa with lime juice, salt, pepper, sugar, garlic, and cilantro to create a dressing.
Fold chopped kimchi into the quinoa dressing until evenly mixed.
Place a layer of cooled sweet potato slices into the ceramic tanje.
Spoon a generous layer of quinoa-kimchi mixture over the sweet potatoes.
Top with a layer of cooled yellow potato slices.
Drizzle olive oil over the final layer and sprinkle smoked paprika.
Chill the assembled bowl for 10 minutes before serving, and garnish with extra cilantro.
